name: XORR
description: Regime-adaptive autonomous SPOT trading agent for the BNB Hack: AI Trading Agent Edition. Trades long-only spot on PancakeSwap across the eligible BEP-20 majors, driven by mean-reversion (buy oversold liquidation flushes, sell the bounce) plus breakout/trend strategies, with a two-tier kill switch that keeps drawdown under the disqualification gate. Self-custody on BNB Smart Chain; market data from CoinMarketCap.

skills.name: Liquidation-flush mean reversion
skills.description: Buys oversold majors after forced-selling flushes and exits into the bounce.

skills.name: Donchian / breakout longs
skills.description: Long breakouts in confirmed up-trending tape.

skills.name: Drawdown-disqualification guard
skills.description: Two-tier soft/hard kill switch keeps max drawdown under the 30% competition cap.
